metadata.description: {\rtf1 DeHumanizer Pro\par Intentional dynamics shaping for modern drum programming.\par \par Two independent engines:\par \par VELOCITY ENGINE — Drawable curve canvas for shaping velocity across a phrase. Role-aware targeting, live preview, drift tension, phrase reset logic, and full persistence.\par \par TIMING ENGINE — Per-role lean (rush/drag) and scatter with biased bell-curve distribution. Drawable per-role scatter curves for phrase-position-aware timing variance. Beat-aware tightening keeps downbeats locked. Tempo-aware PPQ math and BPM-aware tooltips.\par \par Requires ReaImGui.}

version.author: Dead Pixel Design
version.changelog: * Fixed: Learn from Selection (was "Learn Pitch") * Fixed: nil velocity crash on edge cases * Fixed: phrase boundary reset logic * Removed: orphaned state variables

version.author: Dead Pixel Design
version.changelog: * Added: velocity preview (orange dots overlaid on canvas) * Added: curve persistence across sessions * Added: mouse interpolation for smooth curve painting * Added: right-click erase on curve canvas * Added: canvas legend (Original / Preview / LMB:draw / RMB:erase)

version.author: Dead Pixel Design
version.changelog: * Renamed: "PROCESS PHRASE" button is now "APPLY VELOCITY" for clarity alongside "APPLY TIMING" * Added: visible section header above velocity curve area (VELOCITY SHAPING) * Added: visible section header above timing engine section (TIMING ENGINE) * Added: axis context hint on velocity canvas ("Draw velocity shape: bottom = Min Vel, top = Max Vel") * Fixed: reduced default window height from 860 to 640 so APPLY TIMING button is visible without scrolling * Verified: velocity canvas and per-role timing variance canvases use independent ImGui IDs (no interaction bleed) * Updated: window title and script header to v5.4
